description: ULW Mode Trigger Optimization - Replace loose keyword detection with explicit /ulw prefix, slash command, and inline prompt activation

userStories.title: Stricter keyword detection in hook
userStories.description: As a user, I want the keyword trigger to require /ulw at the start of my message instead of matching ulw anywhere, so that I don't accidentally activate ULW mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove [ultrawork] and bare ulw from KEYWORD_MAP in src/session/hooks/detection-checking.ts
Add /ulw prefix detection: only match /^\s*\/ulw\b/i on the last user message text
When /ulw prefix is detected, set ctx.variant = 'max'
When /ulw prefix is detected, strip the /ulw prefix (and leading whitespace) from the last user message text in ctx.messages
Message stripping handles both string content and multipart content (array with type: text)
/ulw in the middle of a message does NOT trigger (e.g., 'check ulw config' -> no variant set)
Existing [analyze-mode] and [review-mode] keywords are unaffected
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Update keyword-detector tests for new behavior
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests updated to verify the stricter /ulw matching and message stripping.
acceptanceCriteria: Update test/session/hooks/detection-checking.test.ts: test '[ultrawork]' no longer triggers variant
Update test: bare 'ulw' in message no longer triggers variant
Add test: '/ulw fix the bug' at start -> variant = max, message text becomes 'fix the bug'
Add test: '  /ulw fix the bug' (leading whitespace) -> variant = max, message text becomes 'fix the bug'
Add test: 'please /ulw fix' (not at start) -> no variant set, message unchanged
Add test: '/ulw' alone -> variant = max, message text becomes empty string
Add test: multipart content with /ulw prefix -> variant set, prefix stripped from text part
Existing [analyze-mode] and [review-mode] tests still pass
All tests pass via bun run test:parallel --pattern '**/test/session/hooks/detection-checking.test.ts'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: One-shot variant API in local context
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the local.model.variant API extended with one-shot support so that /ulw activation auto-reverts after one prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: Add _previous: string | undefined and _isOneShot: boolean internal fields to variant object in src/cli/cmd/tui/context/local.tsx
Add setOneShot(value: string) method: saves current variant to _previous, calls set(value), sets _isOneShot = true
Add revertOneShot() method: if _isOneShot is true, calls set(_previous), resets _isOneShot to false and _previous to undefined
Add isOneShot() accessor that returns _isOneShot state
Existing set() method clears _isOneShot flag (so manual/cycle selections are persistent)
Existing cycle() method clears _isOneShot flag
One-shot state is NOT persisted to model.json (transient, session-only)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: /ulw slash command in TUI
userStories.description: As a TUI user, I want a /ulw slash command so that I can explicitly activate ULW mode for my next message.
acceptanceCriteria: Register /ulw command via command.register() in session route or app.tsx
Slash command has name 'ulw' and description 'activate ULW (max variant) for next message'
Selecting /ulw when variant is not max: calls local.model.variant.setOneShot('max')
Selecting /ulw when variant is already max: calls local.model.variant.set(undefined) to toggle off
Command is visible in autocomplete (not hidden) and command palette
Status bar shows existing variant indicator when ULW is active (no new UI needed)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Inline /ulw prefix detection and one-shot revert in TUI prompt
userStories.description: As a user, I want to type '/ulw fix the bug' in the prompt input and have ULW activate for that message only, with /ulw stripped from the sent text.
acceptanceCriteria: In prompt/index.tsx submit handler, detect /ulw prefix at start of message text (regex: /^\s*\/ulw\s+/i)
When detected: strip /ulw prefix from message text before sending to SDK
When detected: call local.model.variant.setOneShot('max') before sending
'/ulw' alone (no following text) sets one-shot variant but does not send an empty message (same as slash command behavior)
After sdk.session.prompt() is called, call local.model.variant.revertOneShot() to restore previous variant
revertOneShot() is also called after slash-command-activated one-shot prompt is sent
Variant does NOT persist to subsequent messages
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Inline /ulw prefix in CLI run command
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want opencode run '/ulw fix the bug' to activate ULW for that message with the prefix stripped.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/cli/cmd/run.ts, after message is assembled, detect /ulw prefix (regex: /^\s*\/ulw\s+/i)
When detected: strip /ulw prefix from message text
When detected: set variant to 'max' (override args.variant if not already set)
'/ulw' alone with no following text: print error and exit (CLI requires a message)
Existing --variant flag still works and takes precedence if both /ulw prefix and --variant are provided
Typecheck passes
